title: typegen fleet-wide
manager: Every host gets the machine's type surface in its own idiom — C headers, Rust enums, Python type hints — via target plugins, with no certification gate. This scales the v10 TypeScript typegen to the whole fleet: whatever language you consume a machine from, you get compile-time-checked state and action names and data shapes in that language's native types, so the machine is as pleasant and safe to use from C as it is from TypeScript.
cs: typegen C headers / Rust enums / Python hints via target plugins (no cert gate); the fleet-wide scaling of v10 typegen (W6.106).
